description: Configure Jolly Lobby Track to support a new visitor parking workflow. Add a text field named 'License Plate' to the Visitor database schema. Create and save a landscape-oriented badge template named 'Parking Permit' that includes the 'Visitor Name' field, the 'License Plate' field, and the static text 'PARKING PERMIT'. Physical printing is not required; ensure the configuration and template are saved within the system.
